title: The Little Star Who Never Gave Up

moral.en: Never give up on your dreams, no matter how many times you fail. Every small step forward brings you closer to your goal.
moral.zh: 无论失败多少次，都不要放弃梦想。每一次小小的进步都会让你离目标更近。

vocabulary.example: The stars began to sparkle in the night sky.
Little Star fell off the clouds many times.
It was a tremendous effort to reach the sky.
Little Star felt encouraged by the kind words.
Little Star began to twinkle brightly.
It was a long journey, but Little Star never stopped.
If you believe, you can achieve anything!

script.content: High up in the sky, there lived a little star named Twinkle. But unlike the other stars, Twinkle had never learned how to sparkle.
Why can't I sparkle like my brothers and sisters?
Twinkle tried and tried, but every time she tried to shine, she would fall off the clouds and land back on the ground.
Ow! This is the 100th time I've fallen! Maybe I'm not meant to be a star...
Just then, Mother Moon came down to visit.
Little Twinkle, why are you so sad?
I keep falling! I can never reach the sky like the other stars. I give up.
Give up? But you've fallen 100 times! That means you've tried 100 times. That's tremendous, my dear!
Let me tell you a secret. Every time you fell, you learned something new. Now, let me teach you the magic sparkle dance!
Mother Moon patiently showed Twinkle the sparkle dance. Step by step, they practiced together.
First, you wiggle your rays. Then, you spin around. And finally, you believe in yourself!
Believe in myself? I... I don't know if I can...
Of course you can! If you believe, you can achieve anything! Now try again!
Twinkle took a deep breath. She wiggled her rays, spun around, and believed with all her heart.
POP! Suddenly, Twinkle began to twinkle! Her light grew brighter and brighter!
I did it! I can sparkle! Thank you, Mother Moon!
You did it yourself, dear. You never gave up, and that's what made you shine!

From that day on, Little Star Twinkle shone the brightest in the whole night sky. And every night, when children looked up, they could see her sparkle and twinkle, reminding them that dreams come true when you never give up.
